'''竏嗾h-dh-f''' ('''kathadhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heliotype|heliotype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heliotype|heliotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾h-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kathadhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadhaf|thithadhaf]] || [[word:jithadhaf|jithadhaf]] || [[word:shithadhaf|shithadhaf]] || [[word:kithadhaf|kithadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadhaf|thuthuthadhaf]] || [[word:jujuthadhaf|jujuthadhaf]] || [[word:shushuthadhaf|shushuthadhaf]] || [[word:kukuthadhaf|kukuthadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadhaf|thuthadhaf]] || [[word:juthadhaf|juthadhaf]] || [[word:shuthadhaf|shuthadhaf]] || [[word:kuthadhaf|kuthadhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadhaf|thuthadhaf]] || [[word:juthadhaf|juthadhaf]] || [[word:shuthadhaf|shuthadhaf]] || [[word:kuthadhaf|kuthadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethadhaf|thethadhaf]] || [[word:jethadhaf|jethadhaf]] || [[word:shethadhaf|shethadhaf]] || [[word:kethadhaf|kethadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothadhaf|thothothadhaf]] || [[word:jojothadhaf|jojothadhaf]] || [[word:shoshothadhaf|shoshothadhaf]] || [[word:kokothadhaf|kokothadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadhaf|thothadhaf]] || [[word:jothadhaf|jothadhaf]] || [[word:shothadhaf|shothadhaf]] || [[word:kothadhaf|kothadhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadhaf|thothadhaf]] || [[word:jothadhaf|jothadhaf]] || [[word:shothadhaf|shothadhaf]] || [[word:kothadhaf|kothadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦthadhaf|thﾃｦthadhaf]] || [[word:jﾃｦthadhaf|jﾃｦthadhaf]] || [[word:shﾃｦthadhaf|shﾃｦthadhaf]] || [[word:kﾃｦthadhaf|kﾃｦthadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadhaf|thathathadhaf]] || [[word:jajathadhaf|jajathadhaf]] || [[word:shashathadhaf|shashathadhaf]] || [[word:kakathadhaf|kakathadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadhaf|thathadhaf]] || [[word:jathadhaf|jathadhaf]] || [[word:shathadhaf|shathadhaf]] || [[word:kathadhaf|kathadhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadhaf|thathadhaf]] || [[word:jathadhaf|jathadhaf]] || [[word:shathadhaf|shathadhaf]] || [[word:kathadhaf|kathadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathadhaf|shathadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathadhaf|goshathadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathadhaf|gokishathadhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathadhafnﾃｼ|shathadhafnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhafnknﾃｼ|goshathadhafnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhafnﾃｼ|gokishathadhafnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathadhafshﾃｫ|shathadhafshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkshﾃｫ|goshathadhafnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathadhafshﾃｫ|gokishathadhafshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhafro|shathadhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkro|goshathadhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhafro|gokishathadhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhafmu|shathadhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkmu|goshathadhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhafmu|gokishathadhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathadhafsher|shathadhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathadhafnksher|goshathadhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathadhafsher|gokishathadhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathadhafng|shathadhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkng|goshathadhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathadhafng|gokishathadhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathadhafya|shathadhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkya|goshathadhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathadhafya|gokishathadhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathadhafyam|shathadhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkyam|goshathadhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathadhafyam|gokishathadhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhafnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shathadhafnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhafnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshathadhafnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhafnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishathadhafnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhafnﾃｼro|shathadhafnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhafnknﾃｼro|goshathadhafnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhafnﾃｼro|gokishathadhafnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhafnﾃｼmu|shathadhafnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhafnknﾃｼmu|goshathadhafnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhafnﾃｼmu|gokishathadhafnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhafshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shathadhafshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshathadhafnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhafshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishathadhafshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhafshﾃｫro|shathadhafshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkshﾃｫro|goshathadhafnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhafshﾃｫro|gokishathadhafshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhafshﾃｫmu|shathadhafshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkshﾃｫmu|goshathadhafnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhafshﾃｫmu|gokishathadhafshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhafronﾃｼ|shathadhafronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkronﾃｼ|goshathadhafnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhafronﾃｼ|gokishathadhafronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhafroshﾃｫ|shathadhafroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkroshﾃｫ|goshathadhafnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhafroshﾃｫ|gokishathadhafroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhafromu|shathadhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkromu|goshathadhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhafromu|gokishathadhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhafmunﾃｼ|shathadhafmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkmunﾃｼ|goshathadhafnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhafmunﾃｼ|gokishathadhafmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhafmushﾃｫ|shathadhafmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkmushﾃｫ|goshathadhafnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhafmushﾃｫ|gokishathadhafmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhafmuro|shathadhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhafnkmuro|goshathadhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhafmuro|gokishathadhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
